description: Plugin-distributed hooks for regulatory-compliance. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Scan compliance-conventional files for PII patterns (SSN, EIN, IBAN, PAN, Bermuda TIN, wire instructions) before write completes. Advisory by default; flip exit 0 to exit 2 in the script to block writes entirely for SAR/STR drafting.
